name: Guanaco 33B
license: Apache-2.0 (LoRA adapter); base LLaMA-33B weights under Meta's non-commercial research license
archDisplay: Dense decoder-only transformer (LLaMA-33B base) with 4-bit QLoRA adapter finetune
note: QLoRA 4-bit finetune of LLaMA-33B on OASST1 that reached 97.8% of ChatGPT's Vicuna-benchmark quality (second-best in the paper, after the 65B model's 99.3%) after roughly 12 hours on a single 24GB consumer GPU.
